text: FSx for Lustre @ twesttamanitio. @) adriancanet e Scratch is designed for pure performance e Short term or temp workloads ¢ NO HA .. NO REPLICATION ¢ Larger file systems means more servers, more disks and more chance of failure !! ¢ Persistent has replication within ONE AZ only ¢ Auto-heals when hardware failure occurs * You can backup to S3 with both !! (Manual or Automatic 0-35 day retention)
